name: Iso11783IL_PDDGetValueRaw, Iso11783IL_PDDGetValuePhysical
title: Iso11783IL_PDDGetValueRaw, Iso11783IL_PDDGetValuePhysical
syntax: long Iso11783IL_PDDGetValueRaw(dword ddi, dword elementNumber, long& value); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_PDDGetValueRaw(dbNode implement, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, long& value); // form 2
long Iso11783IL_PDDGetValuePhysical(dword ddi, dword elementNumber, double& value); //form 3
long Iso11783IL_PDDGetValuePhysical(dbNode implement, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, double& value); // form 4
description: Gets the value of a data entity (process variable) without sending any command.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Returns the value of the data entity (process variable).

parameters.name: implement
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

return: Returns the value of the data
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
